ns0:entry.ns0:title: AzureAD/microsoft-identity-web
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cleanuparr/Cleanuparr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cleanuparr/Cleanuparr
Language: c%23
Advanced download manager for the Servarr ecosystem

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dailin521/codex-provider-sync
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dailin521/codex-provider-sync
Language: c%23
Synchronize Codex session provider metadata across rollout files and SQLite state.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI Skills, MCP Tools, and CLI for Unity Engine. Full AI develop and test loop. Use cli for quick setup. Efficient token usage, advanced tools. Any C# method may be turned into a tool by a single line. Works with Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor and any other absolutely for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LorisYounger/VPet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LorisYounger/VPet
Language: c%23
虚拟桌宠模拟器 一个开源的桌宠软件, 可以内置到任何WPF应用程序

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PowerShell/PowerShell
Language: c%23
PowerShell for every system!

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/runner
Language: c%23
The Runner for GitHub Actions 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/builtbybel/FluentCleaner

Language: c%23

Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

URL: https://github.com/dotnet/dotnet

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/UIEffect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/UIEffect
Language: c%23
UIEffect is an open-source package that allows you to intuitively apply rich UI effects directly from the Inspector or via code. Combine various filters, such as grayscale, blur, and dissolve, to decorate your UI with a unique visual style!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: neelabo/NeeView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/neelabo/NeeView
Language: c%23
An image viewer that allows you to browse images in folders and compressed files like a book. Powerful customization is available.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rocksdanister/lively
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rocksdanister/lively
Language: c%23
Free and open-source software that allows users to set animated desktop wallpapers and screensavers powered by WinUI 3.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tylercamp/palcalc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tylercamp/palcalc
